title: Bounded Experiment
description: Defines a scoped, validated, measurable, and reversible agent experiment. Aligned with docs/ai-native/bounded-experiment-policy.md.

allowedFiles.description: Glob patterns the worker MAY edit. Boundary size determines risk tier.

forbiddenFiles.description: Glob patterns the worker MUST NOT edit, even if inside allowedFiles (e.g. .env, node_modules/**, dist/**).

validation.description: Shell commands the worker must run before opening a PR.

type.description: How success is measured: pass-fail (exit code), behavioral (test assertion), documentation (link check), observability (health marker).

description.description: Human-readable description of what constitutes success.

verifier.description: Command or assertion that objectively verifies the metric (e.g. 'npm run check exits 0').

successMetric.description: How success is measured for this experiment.

method.description: Rollback strategy: git-revert (default), revert-and-regenerate (schema/deps), manual-fixforward, custom.

notes.description: Additional rollback guidance when default revert is insufficient.

rollback.description: Defined rollback path — required before execution begins.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files the worker may edit.

softTimeMinutes.description: Soft time limit — worker reports progress at this point.

hardTimeMinutes.description: Hard time limit — worker is terminated at this point.

risk.description: Derived from boundary size and change type: low (1-3 files, docs/config), medium (4-10 files), high (>10 files, auth/data, schema change).

experimentState.description: Current lifecycle state of the experiment.

sourceIssue.description: GitHub issue number that originated this experiment.

conflictGroup.description: Tasks in the same group must not run concurrently on overlapping files.

successMetricsPassed.description: Whether the experiment's success metric was verified after execution.

evaluatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the experiment was evaluated.

rollbackExecuted.description: Whether a rollback was triggered for this experiment.
